zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Bernanke於1337年3月7日出生在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾時，她的父親John Bernanke32歲，母親Joan de Marmion24歲。她於1352年1月20日之前與Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell在英國諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年4月10日在英國林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾享年82歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾藍布利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Bernanke于1337年3月7日出生在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾时，她的父亲John Bernanke32岁，母亲Joan de Marmion24岁。她于1352年1月20日之前与Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell在英国諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1419年4月10日在英国林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾享年82岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾藍布利。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Bernanke was born on 7 March 1337, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John Bernanke, was 32 and her mother, Joan de Marmion, was 24. She married Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell before 20 January 1352, in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 10 April 1419, in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Lambley, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Bernanke est née le 7 mars 1337, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Bernanke, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan de Marmion, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell avant 20 janvier 1352, à Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1419, à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Lambley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Bernanke am 7. März 1337 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bernanke 32 und ihre Mutter Joan de Marmion 24. Sie hat vor 20. Januar 1352 in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. April 1419 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Lambley, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Bernanke è nata il il 7 marzo 1337 nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, John Bernanke, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Joan de Marmion, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell prima del 20 gennaio 1352, nel Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1419, nel Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Lambley, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Bernankeが1337年3月7日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで生まれた時，父John Bernankeは32歳，母Joan de Marmionは24歳であった。1352年1月20日以前にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエルでSir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1419年4月10日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルで82歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアランブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Bernanke(이)가 1337년 3월 7일 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bernanke(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Marmion(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1352년 1월 20일 이전 영국 노틴그함실르 크롬웰에서 Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 4월 10일 영국 링코실르 호른카스틀에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 램리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Bernanke nasceu em 7 de março de 1337, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bernanke, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Marmion, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell antes 20 de janeiro de 1352, em Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1419, em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Lambley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Bernanke родилась 7 марта 1337 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bernanke было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Marmion, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell перед 20 январь 1352 г. в местности кромвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 10 апреля 1419 г. в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности лэмбли, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell antes de 20 de enero de 1352, en Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas.
